creator: swills@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 169692
RUBY_SHEBANG_FILES removal patch

The RUBY_SHEBANG_FILES in bsd.ruby.mk isn't needed with USES=shebangfix. So I've removed all instances of RUBY_SHEBANG_FILES from the tree and created this patch to remove it. Please exp-run. See attached patch or https://reviews.freebsd.org/D6092
